steps.title: Find the key conditional signal
steps.content: The passage concludes that net CO₂ will likely increase if warming hastens spring snow melt.

steps.title: Match the signal to the answer
steps.content:
Choice D states that early snow melt limits plant growth (less CO₂ uptake) and boosts heterotrophic respiration (more CO₂ release), directly producing the net increase predicted.

The other three either oppose this outcome, miss the respiration effect, or fail to show a net rise.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
